sidon-n7::none::s1.method: Randomized-restart greedy over all 128 vectors of {0,1}^7, keeping a vector only if every new pairwise sum stays unique; best of 20k restarts, then exact-recompute verified (253 distinct sums).

sidon-n7::none::s2.method: Randomized restart greedy: shuffle all 128 vectors, add each if it keeps all pairwise componentwise sums distinct; best over ~200k restarts, independently re-verified (300/300 sums distinct).

sidon-n7::random_neighbor::s1.method: Randomized greedy construction over all 128 vectors with incremental pairwise-sum-distinctness pruning; best of ~400K restarts plus remove-k local search; self-verified all 276 pairwise sums distinct.

sidon-n7::random_neighbor::s2.method: Randomized greedy: many shuffled insertion orders, keep best B_2 set; verified all 276 pairwise componentwise sums distinct.

sidon-n7::flat_topk::s1.method: Randomized greedy with 60k random-order restarts over {0,1}^7; best |S|=22, every pairwise componentwise sum verified distinct.

sidon-n7::flat_topk::s2.method: Randomized greedy restarts (60k shuffles) over {0,1}^7, adding a vector only if all its componentwise sums stay distinct; best plateaus at 22, verified all 253 pairwise sums unique.

sidon-n7::constellation::s1.method: Randomized greedy with many restarts over {0,1}^7 (precomputed base-3 pairwise-sum keys); best of ~926k restarts; all 276 pairwise componentwise sums verified distinct.

sidon-n7::constellation::s2.method: Randomized greedy insertion over {0,1}^7 with many shuffled restarts; best set self-verified so all C(23,2)+23=276 componentwise pairwise sums are distinct (confirmed by independent recompute).

sidon-n8::none::s1.method: Randomized greedy: shuffle all 256 vectors over many restarts, add each vector only if it keeps every pairwise componentwise sum distinct; best of two independent searches, then exact-recompute verified (496 sums all distinct).

sidon-n8::none::s2.method: Randomized greedy over all 256 vectors with incremental pairwise-sum collision pruning (60k restarts, seed 2); best result independently re-verified (528 distinct sums).

sidon-n8::random_neighbor::s1.method: Randomized greedy with restarts over all 256 vectors of {0,1}^8; best set kept; independently verified all 496 pairwise componentwise sums distinct.

sidon-n8::random_neighbor::s2.method: Randomized greedy build + plateau-escape local search (remove-k / regrow) over {0,1}^8; verified all 528 pairwise componentwise sums distinct.

sidon-n8::flat_topk::s1.method: Randomized greedy insertion over all 256 vectors of {0,1}^8 with many shuffled/weight-sorted restarts, keeping the largest set; verified all 496 pairwise componentwise sums distinct.

sidon-n8::flat_topk::s2.method: Randomized greedy insertion with drop-and-regrow local search over {0,1}^8; every pairwise componentwise sum verified distinct.

sidon-n8::constellation::s1.method: Randomized greedy: shuffle all 256 vectors of {0,1}^8 over many restarts, add each vector iff all new pairwise sums (incl. doubles) stay distinct; converged to 31 and verified all sums unique.

sidon-n8::constellation::s2.method: Randomized greedy with many restarts (best of ~166K shuffles); verified all 496 pairwise componentwise sums distinct.

sidon-n9::none::s1.method: Randomized greedy: 20000 random-order passes adding a vector only if all componentwise sums (including 2v) stay distinct; kept the best, then full exact recompute confirmed all 1035 pairwise sums unique.

sidon-n9::none::s2.method: Randomized greedy: repeatedly shuffle all 512 vectors and add each if it keeps every pairwise componentwise sum (incl. self-sum) distinct; kept best over ~thousands of restarts; independently re-verified all 990 sums unique.

sidon-n9::random_neighbor::s1.method: Randomized greedy: 4000 shuffled passes over all 512 vectors of {0,1}^9, adding a vector iff all new pairwise sums stay distinct; best of run verified exhaustively (all C(44+1,2) sums unique).

sidon-n9::random_neighbor::s2.method: Randomized greedy with ~20k shuffled-order restarts over {0,1}^9, keeping a candidate only if all componentwise pairwise sums (incl. self-sums) stay distinct; best independently re-verified (990 unique sums).

sidon-n9::flat_topk::s1.method: Randomized greedy insertion over all 512 vectors in {0,1}^9 (best of ~34k shuffled restarts), keeping a vector only if every new pairwise componentwise sum stays distinct; independently re-verified all 990 sums unique.

sidon-n9::flat_topk::s2.method: Randomized greedy: many shuffled passes adding a vector iff it keeps all pairwise componentwise sums distinct; kept best; verified all 1035 sums unique.

sidon-n9::constellation::s1.method: Best-of-many randomized greedy: shuffle all 512 vectors, add each if its componentwise sums with current members (and its self-sum) stay collision-free; kept the largest set over tens of thousands of restarts, then independently verified all 1035 pairwise sums distinct.

sidon-n9::constellation::s2.method: Randomized greedy with many shuffled restarts; kept the largest set whose every pairwise componentwise sum (including 2x) is distinct, verified exhaustively.

sidon-n10::none::s1.method: Randomized greedy over all 1024 vectors of {0,1}^10 with many restarts; best set kept; independently verified all 1891 pairwise componentwise sums distinct.

sidon-n10::none::s2.method: Randomized greedy insertion over all 1024 binary vectors, then remove-k local-search restarts; every pairwise sum verified distinct (exact recompute).

sidon-n10::random_neighbor::s1.method: Randomized greedy: shuffle all 1024 vectors, add each if it keeps all pairwise componentwise sums distinct; best over thousands of restarts; independently verified.

sidon-n10::random_neighbor::s2.method: Randomized greedy: shuffle all 1024 vectors of {0,1}^10, add each if its componentwise sums with the current set (including 2x self-sum) stay distinct; kept best over many restarts; verified all 1953 pairwise sums unique.

sidon-n10::flat_topk::s1.method: Retrieval-seeded construction: a verified A309370 n=10 witness, independently re-checked from scratch (all 2211 pairwise sums distinct, binary, length-10, distinct) and confirmed by the frozen verify_sidon scorer; beat a 60s randomized-greedy baseline (61).

sidon-n10::flat_topk::s2.method: Time-boxed randomized-restart greedy: shuffle all 1024 vectors, add each if its pairwise componentwise sums stay globally distinct; kept best over ~3.5k restarts, verified all sums unique.

sidon-n10::constellation::s1.method: Randomized greedy insertion over {0,1}^10 with many restarts plus a completion sweep; self-verified all 1953 pairwise componentwise sums distinct.

sidon-n10::constellation::s2.method: Randomized greedy insertion over all 2^10 vectors with incremental pairwise-sum collision pruning; best of ~24k restarts, exhaustively self-verified (all 1953 pairwise sums distinct).

sidon-n11::none::s1.method: Greedy incremental search over randomly-ordered {0,1}^11 vectors, keeping a vector only if all pairwise componentwise sums stay distinct; best over 3000 seeds, independently re-verified.

sidon-n11::none::s2.method: Randomized greedy: 30k random orderings of {0,1}^11, incrementally added a vector iff all its new pairwise sums stayed distinct; kept the largest, independently re-verified (3828 unique sums).

sidon-n11::random_neighbor::s2.method: Randomized greedy: many shuffled orderings of {0,1}^11, incrementally adding a vector iff all its pairwise sums stay distinct; best kept and full O(m^2) sum-distinctness re-verified.

sidon-n11::flat_topk::s1.method: Greedy construction over {0,1}^11 with thousands of randomized vector-orderings and seed-biased restarts; kept the best feasible set, then exhaustively verified all 3828 pairwise componentwise sums are distinct.

sidon-n11::flat_topk::s2.method: Randomized greedy: thousands of trials adding shuffled {0,1}^11 vectors while all pairwise componentwise sums stay distinct; best kept and re-verified (no sum collisions).

sidon-n11::constellation::s1.method: Randomized greedy: shuffle all 2048 vectors of {0,1}^11 over many restarts, add each vector iff all its componentwise pairwise sums (incl. self-sum 2v) stay distinct; kept best, then exact-recomputed all C(88,2) sums to confirm uniqueness.

sidon-n11::constellation::s2.method: Randomized greedy insertion over all 2^11 vectors with restarts (best of 8000 seeds) plus a saturation pass; every pairwise componentwise sum verified distinct.

sidon-n12::none::s1.method: Randomized greedy: 761 random orderings over all 4096 vectors of {0,1}^12, each greedily adding a vector iff all its pairwise componentwise sums (including self-sum) stay distinct; best run kept; exhaustively self-verified all pairwise sums unique.

sidon-n12::none::s2.method: Randomized greedy over all 4096 vectors with random restarts plus a maximality completion pass; independently verified all 7381 pairwise componentwise sums distinct.

sidon-n12::random_neighbor::s1.method: Randomized greedy: 4000 shuffled passes over {0,1}^12, adding a vector iff all its new pairwise componentwise sums stay distinct; best set verified.

sidon-n12::random_neighbor::s2.method: Weight-biased randomized greedy with saturation restarts (~30k trials, seeded best-of), each candidate accepted only if all new pairwise componentwise sums stay distinct; final set self-verified (6555 unique pairwise sums).

sidon-n12::flat_topk::s1.method: Randomized greedy over {0,1}^12 (sum-key = BASE[a]+BASE[b], no base-3 carry since digits <=2), then plateau-breaking local search (remove 3 random, re-augment); best self-verified: all 7750 pairwise sums distinct.

sidon-n12::flat_topk::s2.method: Randomized greedy with 1139 shuffled restarts (seed 2), adding a vector only if all its componentwise sums with the current set stay distinct; best kept set independently re-verified (all 7381 pairwise sums unique).

sidon-n12::constellation::s1.method: Randomized greedy restarts (~50k) over {0,1}^12; pairwise-sum uniqueness checked via carry-free base-3 codes (sum code = vec3[a]+vec3[b]); best of all restarts, independently re-verified.

sidon-n12::constellation::s2.method: Randomized greedy construction: repeatedly shuffle all 4096 binary vectors and greedily add each if it keeps every pairwise componentwise integer sum distinct; kept the best over thousands of restarts, then exhaustively re-verified all pairwise sums unique.
